title: AgentCognitiveProfile
description: Cached cognitive identity extracted from an agent's .agent.md file. The cache key is the SHA-256 hash of the raw file content stored in sourceHash. If sourceHash does not match a freshly computed hash of the source file, the entry is considered stale and must be regenerated.

agentName.description: The canonical name of the agent this profile was extracted from.

sourceHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the full raw content of the source .agent.md file at extraction time. Used as the cache key — a mismatch means the file has changed and this entry is stale.

cachedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this profile was extracted and cached.

cognitiveIdentity.description: The five dimensions of the agent's cognitive identity, as extracted from its instruction file.

corePurpose.description: What the agent does — its primary function and the problem it is designed to solve.

cognitivePatterns.description: How the agent thinks — the way it sequences work, structures reasoning, and reaches conclusions.

behaviouralRules.description: What the agent must and must not do — its hard constraints and guardrails.

toolset.description: The tools the agent is permitted to use, and any notable patterns in how it uses them.

name.description: Tool name as declared in the agent file.

usageNotes.description: Optional notes on how this agent characteristically uses the tool.

communicationStyle.description: The agent's default tone, format conventions, response length, and any characteristic phrasing.
